SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into on this 1st day of October, 2023.

BETWEEN:
Dr. Jonathan Lee (NRIC: S1234567A), residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 098765 ("Seller"), and

Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 201912345N), having its registered office at 456 Raffles Place, #08-01, Singapore 048621 ("Purchaser").

Contact Details:
Phone: +65 6123 4567
Email: jonathan.lee@techinnovations.sg

WHEREAS, the Seller agrees to sell, and the Purchaser agrees to purchase, 10,000 shares of XYZ Solutions Pte. Ltd. for a total consideration of SGD 500,000.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
